name: @aalalice233/pi-goal-x
description_en: Goal mode extension for pi: persistent long-running objectives, /goal-set drafting, Sisyphus prompt style, autoContinue, and an above-editor status overlay. Fork with merged PR fixes for runtime init error and checkpoint delegation.
description_zh: pi的目标模式扩展：持久化的长期目标、/goal-set草稿、西西弗斯提示风格、autoContinue和编辑器上方的状态覆盖。合并了运行时初始化错误和检查点委托修复的PR的分支
